headline: ETH Plunges Toward $1K Amid Key Support Breach

article.title: ETH crash to $1K looms if key support breaks: Will futures traders step in?
article.summary: Ether’s futures open interest fell by 25%, putting pressure on the $1,500 support level. Is a drop to $1,000 next?

headline: Solana CEO Urges $1B Crypto Shield Law Now

article.title: Solana Institute CEO says CLARITY Act must shield open-source developers
article.summary: Kristin Smith urged the Senate to preserve developer protections in the CLARITY Act, arguing open-source builders should not be regulated as financial intermediaries.

headline: US Stocks Drop 2% on Iran Strike, Oil Surges

article.title: Stocks Set to Decline as US Hits Iran, Oil Gains: Markets Wrap
article.summary: Asian equities were set to fall as tensions escalated in the Middle East after US forces struck Iran, while technology stocks remained under pressure on Wall Street. Crude oil climbed.

headline: Crude Surges 4% on US Iran Strikes

article.title: Oil Climbs After Fresh US Strikes on Iran Over Helicopter Attack
article.summary: Oil rebounded after the US launched fresh strikes against Iran following the downing of an American helicopter, posing a new threat to a fragile truce that’s been tested by recent attacks in the Middle East.

headline: EU Fines Meta $1B Over WhatsApp Access
